title: Troubleshoot Duplicate Pop-ups
overview: Fix duplicate pop-ups that appear when customizing existing action to open a modal.
issue: Duplicate pop-ups are getting opened when customizing the existing action to open a modal

steps.title: Verify app-customization.impl.ts
steps.description: Check the app-customization.impl.ts file where the custom action is registered. The issue occurs when the provider configuration is incorrect.

steps.title: Use useClass Parameter with Extended Class Name
steps.description: Pass useClass parameter as Extended class name in the provider configuration to properly override the OOB service.

steps.title: Verify the Fix
steps.description: Rebuild and test the application. Click the action button and verify that only one modal opens.

keyPoints: Use useClass to properly override OOB services
Provide the OOB service class in 'provide' field
Use custom service class in 'useClass' field
This pattern prevents duplicate service instantiation
commonExamples: Cancel Order: provide: CancelOrderActionService, useClass: ExtnCancelOrderActionService
Edit Order: provide: EditOrderActionService, useClass: ExtnEditOrderActionService
Create Return: provide: CreateReturnActionService, useClass: ExtnCreateReturnActionService
View Details: provide: ViewDetailsActionService, useClass: ExtnViewDetailsActionService
